legalAcceptances.documentSnapshot:
KZNCC SERVICE TERMS AND CONDITIONS

Inkolo Connect Platform

Effective Date: 10 June 2026 Version: 1.0

Inkolo Connect (Pty) Ltd - Registration number 2025/674136/07

These KZNCC Service Terms and Conditions apply to all users, members, churches, branches, church leaders, administrators, service providers and community participants who access, use, participate in or receive communication, services, benefits, records, dashboards, payments or support through the KZNCC service environment made available on the Inkolo Connect platform.

By accessing or using any KZNCC-related service, dashboard, community, church profile, member profile, payment tool, communication tool or service module on the Inkolo Connect platform, the user agrees to these Terms and Conditions, together with the Inkolo Connect Terms and Conditions of Use, Privacy Policy, Wallet Terms, Payment Terms, Community Terms, Service-Specific Terms and any additional policies published by Inkolo Connect from time to time.

1. Definitions

In these Terms:

“Inkolo Connect”, “Inkolo”, “we”, “us” or “our” means Inkolo Connect (Pty) Ltd, including its platform, systems, dashboards, applications, service modules, employees, contractors, agents and approved platform partners.

“Platform” means the Inkolo Connect digital platform, including its website, mobile application, dashboards, member profiles, wallet tools, payment tools, communication tools, document tools, community tools and service modules.

“KZNCC” means the KwaZulu-Natal Christian Council, including its authorised structures, office bearers, representatives, member churches, branches, administrators and approved delegates, where applicable.

“KZNCC Service” means the digital service environment made available through Inkolo Connect for KZNCC, its member churches, church leaders, administrators and members.

“Church” means any church, branch, congregation, denomination, ministry, fellowship, religious organisation or faith-based body linked to or participating under KZNCC through the Platform.

“Member” means any individual registered on the Platform and linked to KZNCC, a Church, branch, community or service.

“Church Leader” means any pastor, bishop, minister, reverend, priest, elder, deacon, administrator, committee member, board member, authorised officer or other person appointed or recognised by a Church or KZNCC.

“KZNCC Administrator” means any person authorised by KZNCC to access, view, manage or use KZNCC-related dashboards, records, communications or reports on the Platform.

“User” means any person who accesses or uses the Platform, including Members, Church Leaders, KZNCC representatives, administrators, service providers, merchants, donors, volunteers and community participants.

“Service Provider” means any third-party provider, insurer, bank, payment provider, VAS provider, funeral cover provider, education provider, connectivity provider, merchant, vendor or other approved partner whose service may be made available to KZNCC, Churches or Members through the Platform.

2. Purpose of the KZNCC Service

The KZNCC Service is intended to provide digital tools to assist KZNCC, its member Churches and Members with platform-based administration, communication, member registration, digital community management, service access and reporting.

The KZNCC Service may include:

KZNCC dashboard access;

Church and branch dashboards;

member registration tools;

digital member profiles;

communication tools;

event tools;

document upload and storage tools;

Wallet and payment facilitation tools;

service activation tools;

reports and member counts;

access to approved paid and free services;

access to third-party services;

benefit communication;

revenue-share reporting where applicable;

any other approved platform service made available from time to time.

Inkolo Connect provides the digital platform and related technology tools only.

Inkolo Connect does not control, manage or take responsibility for KZNCC’s internal governance, decisions, leadership, membership, communication content, pastoral affairs, church disputes, member disputes or KZNCC’s relationship with its Churches and Members.

3. Inkolo Connect as Platform Provider Only

The user understands and agrees that Inkolo Connect is the platform provider only.

Unless expressly stated in a separate written agreement, Inkolo Connect is not:

KZNCC;

a Church;

a Church Leader;

a religious authority;

a governing body of KZNCC;

a governing body of any Church;

an employer of KZNCC staff or Church staff;

a representative of any individual Member;

a decision-maker in KZNCC internal affairs;

a guarantor of any KZNCC benefit, service or decision;

responsible for disputes between KZNCC and Members;

responsible for disputes between KZNCC and Churches;

responsible for disputes between Churches and Members.

Inkolo Connect provides digital access, platform infrastructure, dashboards, communication tools, payment facilitation tools and service access tools.

Inkolo Connect does not assume liability for the conduct, decisions, omissions, statements, disputes or obligations of KZNCC, its Churches, Church Leaders, administrators or Members.

4. Relationship Between KZNCC and Members

Any relationship between KZNCC and a Member remains directly between KZNCC and that Member.

Inkolo Connect is not responsible for:

whether a Member is accepted by KZNCC;

whether a Member is recognised by a Church;

whether a Member qualifies for any KZNCC programme;

whether a Member receives a benefit;

whether a Member is included or excluded from a KZNCC activity;

whether a Member is disciplined, suspended or removed by a Church or KZNCC;

any promise, representation or decision made by KZNCC or a Church;

any disagreement between KZNCC and a Member.

Any dispute between KZNCC and a Member must be resolved directly between KZNCC and the Member, according to KZNCC’s rules, Church rules, applicable mandates, policies, constitutions, dispute procedures and South African law.

5. Relationship Between KZNCC and Churches

Any relationship between KZNCC and its member Churches remains directly between KZNCC and those Churches.

Inkolo Connect is not responsible for:

whether a Church is accepted by KZNCC;

whether a Church remains affiliated with KZNCC;

whether a Church is removed from KZNCC;

whether KZNCC recognises a Church Leader;

whether KZNCC recognises a branch;

disputes between KZNCC and Churches;

disputes between Churches;

branch recognition disputes;

leadership recognition disputes;

mandate disputes;

governance disputes;

disciplinary disputes;

financial disputes between KZNCC and Churches.

Where a dispute exists between KZNCC and a Church, Inkolo Connect may restrict dashboard changes, administrator access, communication functions or payment changes until proper written authority or legal clarity is provided.

6. KZNCC Dashboard and Reporting

The Platform may provide KZNCC with dashboards, reports and information relating to member churches, branches, member counts, service activation, paid services, revenue-share information, communication records and other approved data.

Dashboard information is dependent on data captured by users, Churches, KZNCC administrators, Service Providers and platform systems.

Inkolo Connect does not guarantee that dashboard information will always be complete, accurate, current or error-free.

KZNCC and authorised administrators are responsible for reviewing and verifying information used for decision-making.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for internal KZNCC decisions, Church decisions, financial decisions, member decisions or service decisions based on dashboard information unless a proven platform fault directly caused the error.

7. KZNCC Administrators

KZNCC may appoint authorised administrators to access and manage certain KZNCC-related platform functions.

KZNCC is responsible for ensuring that its administrators are properly authorised, trained, trustworthy and mandated.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for any loss, dispute, unauthorised instruction, incorrect message, incorrect member update, payment dispute, data change, reputational harm or internal conflict caused by a KZNCC administrator.

Inkolo Connect may suspend or restrict administrator access where there is suspected fraud, conflict, unauthorised use, leadership dispute, legal risk, security risk, privacy risk or breach of these Terms.

8. Church and Branch Selection

Members may be required to select their Church, branch or KZNCC-linked community from the Platform.

The Member is responsible for selecting the correct Church or branch.

KZNCC and Church administrators may assist with correcting incorrect selections.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for incorrect communication, incorrect dashboard allocation, missed announcements, wrong service allocation, wrong payment allocation or disputes caused by incorrect Church or branch selection by the Member or administrator.

9. Communications from KZNCC and Churches

The Platform may allow KZNCC, Churches, Church Leaders and authorised administrators to send announcements, messages, event notices, documents, service notices, benefit notices or other communications to Members.

KZNCC and the relevant Church are responsible for the content of their communications.

Inkolo Connect is not responsible for:

incorrect messages;

unauthorised messages;

misleading messages;

offensive messages;

late messages;

failed delivery;

internal political messages;

doctrinal messages;

pastoral messages;

member reactions to messages;

disputes arising from communications sent by KZNCC or Churches.

Inkolo Connect may remove, restrict or block communications that are unlawful, abusive, discriminatory, defamatory, fraudulent, misleading, threatening, unsafe, reputationally harmful or in breach of Platform rules.

10. KZNCC Services and Benefits

KZNCC may use the Platform to communicate, introduce, promote or manage services, programmes, benefits or opportunities for Members.

These may include free services, paid services, funeral cover, training, connectivity, community benefits, vouchers, job opportunities, wallet services, VAS services or other approved services.

Inkolo Connect does not guarantee that:

any Member will qualify for a benefit;

any benefit will be available permanently;

KZNCC will approve a Member;

a Church will approve a Member;

a Service Provider will approve a Member;

any benefit will be paid;

any service will continue;

any programme will succeed;

any specific outcome will be achieved.

Where a service is provided by a third-party Service Provider, the contract is between the Member and that Service Provider, unless expressly stated otherwise in writing.

11. Payments, Donations, Tithes, Offerings and Contributions

The Platform may allow payments relating to KZNCC, Churches, branches, services, events, donations, tithes, offerings, contributions, subscriptions or benefits.

Unless expressly stated otherwise, such payments are made to the relevant KZNCC structure, Church, Service Provider or recipient and not to Inkolo Connect.

Inkolo Connect may act only as a payment facilitator, Wallet provider, payment channel, technology provider or reporting tool.

Inkolo Connect is not responsible for how KZNCC or a Church uses funds received from Members.

KZNCC and Churches are responsible for their own:

financial governance;

bank accounts;

accounting records;

tax treatment;

receipts;

reporting;

use of funds;

refunds;

member queries;

compliance with their constitutions and applicable law.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for disputes about donations, tithes, offerings, KZNCC contributions, Church funds, alleged misuse of funds, leadership disputes over money, donor dissatisfaction or financial decisions made by KZNCC or Churches.

12. Revenue Share and Service Fees

Certain paid services may include agreed revenue-share structures, platform fees, service fees, administration fees, operating fees or partner fees.

Revenue-share arrangements are governed by the relevant mandate, annexure, commercial agreement, service provider agreement or written arrangement.

Unless expressly stated otherwise, Members do not acquire any right to revenue-share payments between Inkolo Connect, KZNCC, Churches or Service Providers.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for disputes between KZNCC and Churches about revenue-share allocation, internal distribution, use of funds, budgets, salaries, expenses or financial governance.

13. Third-Party Service Providers

The Platform may give Members access to services provided by third-party Service Providers.

These may include:

funeral cover providers;

insurers;

banks;

payment providers;

VAS providers;

connectivity providers;

education providers;

job providers;

transport providers;

property providers;

merchants and vendors;

other approved partners.

Inkolo Connect is not responsible for the Service Provider’s approval, rejection, pricing, delivery, quality, claims, refunds, cancellations, failures, delays or terms.

The Member must read and accept the Service Provider’s own terms before using the service.

14. Internal KZNCC, Church and Member Disputes

Inkolo Connect is not responsible for any internal dispute involving KZNCC, Churches, Church Leaders, administrators or Members.

This includes disputes about:

leadership;

membership;

branch control;

church recognition;

KZNCC affiliation;

removals;

discipline;

doctrine;

governance;

finances;

donations;

community benefits;

communication;

events;

service allocation;

pastoral matters;

family disputes;

political or factional disputes.

Inkolo Connect may preserve records, restrict access or suspend certain functions where necessary to reduce platform risk, but Inkolo Connect does not become responsible for resolving the dispute.

15. Leadership and Authority Disputes

Where there is uncertainty or dispute about who has authority to act for KZNCC, a Church, branch or community, Inkolo Connect may require proof of authority before making platform changes.

Proof may include:

KZNCC resolution;

Church resolution;

board resolution;

constitution;

mandate;

minutes of meeting;

letter from authorised leadership;

court order;

legal opinion;

any other document reasonably required.

Until Inkolo Connect is satisfied, it may freeze or restrict:

administrator changes;

payment changes;

dashboard changes;

communication rights;

member imports;

Church profile changes;

revenue-share settings;

service activation changes.

Inkolo Connect does not decide who the lawful Church Leader or KZNCC representative is. Inkolo Connect only applies reasonable platform risk controls.

16. No Religious, Doctrinal or Pastoral Responsibility

Inkolo Connect does not control KZNCC’s or any Church’s doctrine, sermons, teachings, faith practices, spiritual guidance, pastoral counselling, religious events, rituals or community decisions.

Any religious, spiritual, doctrinal or pastoral content is the responsibility of KZNCC, the relevant Church or the user who provides it.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for religious disagreement, spiritual harm claims, offence, doctrinal disputes, pastoral disputes, member dissatisfaction or emotional distress arising from KZNCC or Church conduct.

17. Events, Meetings and Programmes

KZNCC and Churches may use the Platform to advertise, coordinate or manage events, meetings, training sessions, services, outreach programmes or community activities.

The relevant organiser is responsible for the event or programme.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for:

cancelled events;

event injuries;

event accidents;

venue safety;

transport to or from events;

crowd control;

security;

food safety;

child supervision;

lost property;

event disputes;

incorrect event information.

Users attend KZNCC or Church events at their own risk, unless otherwise stated by the event organiser.

18. User Conduct

Users must use the KZNCC Service respectfully, lawfully and responsibly.

Users may not:

harass KZNCC representatives;

harass Church Leaders;

harass Members;

threaten or intimidate others;

post defamatory content;

publish private disputes;

spread false allegations;

misuse religious or community platforms;

impersonate KZNCC or Church Leaders;

upload false documents;

misuse personal information;

create conflict through platform misuse;

commit fraud;

interfere with Platform security;

use the Platform for unlawful purposes.

Inkolo Connect may suspend or remove users who misuse the Platform or create legal, safety, reputational, operational or community risk.

19. Personal Information and Data

Inkolo Connect may process personal information for:

user registration;

KZNCC member records;

Church and branch allocation;

communication;

dashboard reporting;

service activation;

payment processing;

Wallet services;

document storage;

fraud prevention;

compliance;

support;

dispute handling;

legal obligations.

Personal information may be shared with KZNCC, authorised KZNCC administrators, Churches, Church administrators, Service Providers, Payment Partners, verification providers, regulators or law enforcement where necessary, lawful or consented to.

Users, KZNCC and Churches must not misuse personal information obtained through the Platform.

20. Data Accuracy

KZNCC, Churches, administrators and Members are responsible for ensuring that information captured on the Platform is accurate and updated.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for disputes or losses caused by inaccurate, incomplete, outdated or false information supplied by KZNCC, Churches, administrators, Members or Service Providers.

Inkolo Connect may correct, restrict, archive or preserve data where necessary for platform integrity, legal compliance or dispute handling.

21. Platform Moderation Rights

Inkolo Connect may, at any time and without prior notice:

remove content;

restrict access;

suspend administrator rights;

restrict payment functions;

restrict communication tools;

request proof of authority;

preserve records;

block abusive users;

hide disputed information;

suspend a Church or KZNCC-related dashboard;

report unlawful conduct.

These actions may be taken where Inkolo Connect reasonably believes there is legal, financial, operational, security, reputational, safety, governance, privacy or compliance risk.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for loss, embarrassment, income loss, donation loss, reputation loss or opportunity loss caused by moderation actions taken in good faith.

22. No Endorsement or Guarantee

The presence of KZNCC, a Church, Church Leader, service, benefit or programme on the Platform does not mean Inkolo Connect guarantees, endorses or certifies:

KZNCC’s internal decisions;

Church governance;

Church leadership;

Church finances;

member conduct;

service provider conduct;

benefit availability;

religious content;

financial outcomes;

any specific result.

Users must make their own decisions about participation, services, payments, donations and benefits.

23. Complaints

Complaints about KZNCC decisions, Church conduct, leadership, doctrine, membership, discipline, donations, events, pastoral care, governance or internal disputes must be directed to KZNCC, the relevant Church or the applicable authority.

Complaints about technical platform issues, Wallet errors, dashboard access, platform misuse, privacy concerns or suspected fraud may be submitted to Inkolo Connect support.

Inkolo Connect is not obliged to resolve disputes that are internal to KZNCC, a Church, branch or Member relationship.

24. Service Availability

Inkolo Connect does not guarantee that the KZNCC Service, dashboards, communication tools, payment tools or service modules will always be available, uninterrupted, secure or error-free.

The service may be unavailable due to:

maintenance;

upgrades;

technical failures;

network failures;

payment partner failures;

service provider failures;

cyber incidents;

power failures;

mobile network failures;

events beyond reasonable control.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for loss caused by downtime, delayed messages, failed access, delayed payments or service interruptions.

25. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Inkolo Connect, Duranki, their directors, shareholders, employees, contractors, agents, partners, churches, communities, administrators, Service Providers and affiliates are not liable for any loss, damage, claim, expense or liability arising from:

disputes between KZNCC and Members;

disputes between KZNCC and Churches;

disputes between Churches and Members;

disputes between Church Leaders;

leadership disputes;

governance disputes;

membership disputes;

disciplinary disputes;

doctrine or religious disputes;

pastoral disputes;

communication disputes;

donation disputes;

tithe or offering disputes;

revenue-share disputes;

use of KZNCC or Church funds;

KZNCC administrator actions;

Church administrator actions;

incorrect information supplied by KZNCC, Churches or Members;

service provider failures;

rejected third-party services;

failed benefits;

event incidents;

internal political or factional disputes;

privacy breaches caused by users, KZNCC or Churches;

platform restrictions imposed in good faith;

platform downtime or technical failures.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for indirect, special, consequential or economic losses, including loss of income, loss of donations, loss of opportunity, reputational harm, emotional distress or spiritual distress.

Where liability cannot lawfully be excluded, Inkolo Connect’s liability will be limited to the platform fees actually paid to Inkolo Connect for the specific platform service giving rise to the claim, unless a higher amount is required by law.

26. Indemnity

The user indemnifies and holds harmless Inkolo Connect, Duranki, their directors, shareholders, employees, contractors, agents, partners, churches, communities, administrators, Service Providers and affiliates against any claim, loss, damage, penalty, legal cost, liability or expense arising from:

the user’s use of the KZNCC Service;

the user’s breach of these Terms;

the user’s breach of law;

disputes between the user and KZNCC;

disputes between the user and a Church;

disputes between the user and another Member;

disputes between KZNCC and Churches;

disputes between Church Leaders;

donations, tithes, offerings or contributions;

user content, messages or documents;

defamatory or unlawful statements made by the user;

misuse of personal information;

incorrect information supplied by the user;

claims arising from KZNCC events, Church events or community activities;

any internal KZNCC, Church or Member dispute involving the user.

KZNCC, Churches and administrators using the Platform also indemnify Inkolo Connect against claims arising from their own decisions, communications, governance, funds, administrator actions, member disputes, leadership disputes and internal processes.

This indemnity continues after the user stops using the Platform.

27. Suspension and Removal

Inkolo Connect may suspend, restrict or remove a user, administrator, Church or KZNCC-related access where:

these Terms are breached;

false information is provided;

fraud is suspected;

authority is disputed;

administrator access is misused;

personal information is misused;

unlawful content is posted;

payments are disputed;

platform security is threatened;

there is legal, financial, operational, reputational, privacy, safety or compliance risk;

a lawful instruction, court order, regulator, Service Provider or authorised mandate requires action.

Suspension from the Platform does not necessarily determine membership status in KZNCC or a Church. Membership status remains a matter between the relevant Member, Church and/or KZNCC.

28. Changes to These Terms

Inkolo Connect may update these KZNCC Service Terms from time to time.

Updated Terms may be published on the Platform, sent by notification or made available through the user dashboard.

Continued use of the KZNCC Service after updated Terms are published means the user accepts the updated Terms.

29. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa.

Any dispute will be handled according to South African law, subject to any rights that may not lawfully be excluded.

30. Acceptance

By using the KZNCC Service on the Inkolo Connect Platform, the user confirms that they:

have read these Terms;

understand these Terms;

accept that Inkolo Connect is the Platform provider only;

accept that Inkolo Connect is not KZNCC, a Church, a Church Leader or a religious authority;

accept that Inkolo Connect is not responsible for what happens between KZNCC and Members;

accept that Inkolo Connect is not responsible for what happens between KZNCC and Churches;

accept that disputes between Members, KZNCC, Churches and Church Leaders must be resolved by those parties;

accept responsibility for their own conduct, information, payments, communications and service choices;

agree to indemnify Inkolo Connect against claims arising from KZNCC, Church and Member disputes.

Suggested Platform Checkbox Text

Before a user joins or uses the KZNCC service environment:

I confirm that I have read and accepted the KZNCC Service Terms and Conditions. I understand that Inkolo Connect is only the digital platform provider and is not responsible for disputes, decisions, communication, governance, payments, donations, benefits, discipline, leadership issues or any matter between KZNCC, churches, church leaders and members.

Suggested Short Disclaimer for KZNCC Dashboard

Inkolo Connect provides the digital platform only. KZNCC and its member churches remain responsible for their own governance, members, communication, decisions, payments, donations, events, benefits and internal disputes.

Suggested Member Notice

Your relationship with KZNCC and your selected church remains between you, KZNCC and that church. Inkolo Connect only provides the technology platform and is not responsible for internal KZNCC, church or member disputes.

legalAcceptances.documentSnapshot:
MY COMMUNITY / CHURCH TERMS AND CONDITIONS

Inkolo Connect Platform

Effective Date: 10 June 2026 Version: 1.0

Inkolo Connect (Pty) Ltd - Registration number 2025/674136/07

These My Community / Church Terms and Conditions apply to all users who join, access, participate in, communicate through, donate to, receive messages from, upload content to, or otherwise use a church, branch, ministry, community, group or faith-based community space made available through the Inkolo Connect platform.

By joining or using a church/community space on the platform, the user agrees to these Terms and Conditions, together with the Inkolo Connect Terms and Conditions of Use, Privacy Policy, Acceptable Use Policy, Wallet Terms, Communication Terms, Service-Specific Terms and any additional rules published on the platform from time to time.

1. Definitions

In these Terms:

“Inkolo Connect”, “Inkolo”, “we”, “us” or “our” means Inkolo Connect (Pty) Ltd, including its platform, systems, dashboards, service modules, administrators, employees, contractors, agents and approved platform partners.

“Platform” means the Inkolo Connect digital platform, including its website, mobile application, dashboards, member profiles, communication tools, wallet tools, payment tools and related services.

“My Community” means the platform feature that allows a user to select, join, view or participate in a church, branch, ministry, community, organisation, group or faith-based structure.

“Church” means any church, branch, ministry, denomination, congregation, fellowship, faith organisation, religious body or approved faith-based community made available on the platform.

“Community” means any group, organisation, church, branch, member body, association, programme or approved group structure hosted or represented on the platform.

“Church Leader” means a pastor, bishop, reverend, priest, minister, elder, deacon, administrator, church official, community leader or any person appointed or recognised by a church to perform leadership, administrative or spiritual functions.

“Member” means a user who joins, belongs to, follows, participates in or is linked to a Church or Community on the platform.

“User” means any person who accesses or uses the Platform, including a Member, Church Leader, administrator, visitor, donor, volunteer, service provider or community participant.

“Content” means any message, notice, announcement, document, image, video, post, comment, prayer request, donation reference, event notice, profile information or other material uploaded, shared or sent through the Platform.

2. Purpose of My Community

The My Community feature allows users to digitally connect with their selected Church or Community.

The feature may allow users to:

select their Church or branch;

view Church announcements;

receive messages from Church Leaders or administrators;

communicate with approved Church or Community groups;

access events;

access community services;

make payments, donations, tithes or offerings where available;

view documents or notices;

participate in community activities;

access approved services linked to the Church or Community.

Inkolo Connect provides the digital platform and administrative tools only.

Inkolo Connect does not manage, control, govern, lead or represent the Church unless expressly agreed in writing.

3. Role of Inkolo Connect

Inkolo Connect is a platform facilitator.

Inkolo Connect provides technology, dashboards, communication tools, member management tools, payment facilitation tools and service access tools.

Inkolo Connect is not responsible for the internal affairs of any Church or Community.

Inkolo Connect does not:

appoint Church Leaders;

remove Church Leaders;

decide Church membership;

decide doctrine;

decide religious rules;

decide internal disputes;

manage Church governance;

control Church finances;

approve Church budgets;

audit Church funds;

supervise pastors, bishops or leaders;

decide disciplinary matters;

resolve family or member disputes;

guarantee the conduct of Church Leaders or Members;

guarantee that a Church is properly governed;

guarantee that donations, tithes or offerings are used correctly by the Church.

The relationship between a Member and their Church remains between the Member and that Church.

4. Church and Member Disputes

The user understands and agrees that Inkolo Connect is not responsible for disputes between:

Church Leaders;

pastors and members;

bishops and pastors;

members and members;

branches and head offices;

church committees and members;

churches and denominations;

donors and churches;

family members;

volunteers and church leadership;

service providers and churches;

different church factions or groups.

Internal church disputes must be resolved by the Church according to its own constitution, rules, disciplinary procedures, leadership structures, denomination rules, mediation processes or applicable law.

Inkolo Connect may assist with platform records where legally and practically possible, but Inkolo Connect is not a court, arbitrator, mediator, church tribunal, disciplinary body, spiritual authority or governance body.

5. No Responsibility for Church Governance

Each Church is responsible for its own governance, leadership, constitution, rules, policies, bank accounts, finances, member records, disciplinary processes, meetings, votes, mandates and decision-making.

Inkolo Connect is not responsible for:

leadership elections;

church board disputes;

removals of leaders;

church splits;

church mergers;

disputes over church property;

disputes over church money;

disputes over church assets;

disputes over mandates;

disputes over membership rights;

disputes over branch control;

disagreements over doctrine or religious interpretation;

disciplinary action taken by the Church.

Where there is a leadership dispute, Inkolo Connect may restrict dashboard changes, payment changes, administrator changes or communication rights until proper written authority or legal clarity is provided.

6. Church Administrators and Platform Access

Church administrators may be given access to manage certain Church or Community functions on the platform.

A Church is responsible for ensuring that its appointed administrators are authorised, trustworthy and properly mandated.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for any loss, dispute, incorrect message, incorrect record, unauthorised instruction, deleted content, incorrect member update, financial dispute or internal conflict caused by a Church administrator.

Inkolo Connect may suspend or restrict administrator access if there is suspected fraud, conflict, unauthorised use, leadership dispute, legal risk, security risk or breach of these Terms.

7. Member Selection of Church and Branch

Users may be required to select their Church, branch, congregation or community from a dropdown list or other platform process.

The user is responsible for selecting the correct Church or branch.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for incorrect communication, incorrect membership allocation, missed announcements, wrong community access, wrong payment allocation or disputes caused by the user selecting the wrong Church or branch.

Inkolo Connect may correct or update a user’s Church or branch where instructed by an authorised Church administrator or where required for platform accuracy.

8. Communications and Announcements

The platform may allow Church Leaders and administrators to send messages, announcements, event notices, reminders, documents or other communications to Members.

Churches and Church administrators are responsible for the content they send.

Inkolo Connect does not guarantee that all messages are accurate, lawful, appropriate, approved by the Church, or received by all Members.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for:

incorrect announcements;

offensive messages;

misleading messages;

unauthorised messages;

late messages;

failed delivery;

missed events;

communication disputes;

internal church politics communicated through the platform.

Inkolo Connect may remove or restrict communications that are unlawful, abusive, fraudulent, defamatory, discriminatory, threatening, unsafe, reputationally harmful or in breach of these Terms.

9. User Content and Conduct

Users are responsible for all Content they post, upload, send or share through My Community.

Users must not post or send Content that is:

unlawful;

false;

defamatory;

abusive;

threatening;

discriminatory;

hateful;

sexually explicit;

violent;

fraudulent;

misleading;

invasive of privacy;

damaging to another person’s reputation;

harmful to children;

designed to create conflict or unrest;

in breach of Church or Community rules;

in breach of Inkolo Connect policies.

Inkolo Connect may remove Content, restrict communication tools or suspend users where Content creates legal, safety, reputational, operational or community risk.

10. Respectful Community Participation

Users must participate respectfully and responsibly.

Users may not use My Community to:

harass Church Leaders or Members;

threaten or intimidate others;

spread false allegations;

incite conflict;

publish private disputes;

promote hate speech;

attack another Church or denomination;

misuse religious content to exploit or manipulate others;

solicit money fraudulently;

impersonate a Church Leader;

interfere with Church operations;

damage the reputation of Inkolo Connect, a Church, Community or another Member.

Inkolo Connect may suspend or remove users who misuse the platform.

11. Donations, Tithes, Offerings and Payments

The platform may allow Members to make donations, tithes, offerings, pledges, event payments, community contributions or other payments to a Church or Community.

Unless expressly stated otherwise, such payments are made to the relevant Church or Community and not to Inkolo Connect.

Inkolo Connect may act only as a payment facilitator, wallet provider, payment channel or technology provider.

Inkolo Connect is not responsible for how a Church uses donations, tithes, offerings or contributions once paid to the Church or allocated to the Church wallet/account.

The Church is responsible for:

its own financial governance;

donation records;

financial reporting;

tax treatment;

receipts;

accounting;

use of funds;

member queries;

refund decisions;

compliance with its own constitution and applicable law.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for disputes about Church funds, missing donations, alleged misuse of funds, leadership disputes over money, donor dissatisfaction or how the Church spends money.

12. Payment Errors and Refunds

Users are responsible for checking the amount, recipient, Church, branch and payment reason before making a payment.

Inkolo Connect is not liable where a user pays the wrong Church, wrong branch, wrong amount or wrong reference because of user error.

Inkolo Connect may assist with payment records or payment reversal requests where possible, but refunds are not guaranteed.

Refunds of donations, tithes, offerings or Church payments are subject to the Church’s own rules, applicable law, payment partner rules and platform payment terms.

13. No Guarantee of Church Services

Inkolo Connect does not guarantee that any Church will provide any particular service, support, counselling, pastoral care, event, funeral support, welfare support, prayer support, membership benefit or community benefit.

Any spiritual, pastoral, welfare, counselling or community support provided by a Church is the responsibility of that Church and not Inkolo Connect.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for disappointment, disagreement, emotional distress, religious disputes or pastoral disputes arising from Church services or Church conduct.

14. Events and Activities

The platform may display Church or Community events.

The Church or Community is responsible for organising, managing, controlling and supervising its own events.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for:

cancelled events;

event injuries;

event accidents;

transport to or from events;

food safety;

crowd control;

security;

venue safety;

child supervision;

lost property;

event disputes;

incorrect event information.

Users attend Church or Community events at their own risk, unless otherwise stated in writing by the event organiser.

15. Volunteers and Community Work

The platform may allow Churches or Communities to coordinate volunteers, projects, outreach work or community support.

Any volunteer arrangement is between the Church or Community and the volunteer.

Inkolo Connect is not the employer, supervisor, labour broker, recruiter or safety officer for volunteers or community workers.

The Church or Community is responsible for safety, instructions, supervision, permissions, tools, protective equipment, transport and any legal obligations relating to volunteers or community work.

16. Children and Vulnerable Persons

Churches and Communities are responsible for their own safeguarding policies, child-protection processes, consent requirements and supervision of minors or vulnerable persons.

Users must not upload, share or misuse images, personal information or private details of children or vulnerable persons without proper consent.

Inkolo Connect may remove content or suspend users where child safety or vulnerable-person protection concerns arise.

Inkolo Connect is not responsible for the Church’s failure to supervise, protect or safeguard minors or vulnerable persons.

17. Personal Information

Inkolo Connect may process personal information for:

user registration;

Church and branch allocation;

member records;

communication;

event participation;

payment processing;

wallet services;

service activation;

community reporting;

support;

security;

fraud prevention;

legal compliance.

Personal information may be shared with the selected Church, authorised Church administrators, service providers, payment partners, regulators or law enforcement where necessary, lawful or consented to.

Users must not misuse personal information of Church Leaders, Members, donors, children, volunteers or community participants obtained through the platform.

18. Privacy Between Members

Members must respect the privacy of other Members.

Users may not:

copy member lists without authority;

use member information for personal business without consent;

send spam;

share private phone numbers unlawfully;

publish private disputes;

expose personal information;

use Church data for political, commercial or unauthorised purposes;

contact Members outside the purpose for which information was provided.

Breach of privacy may result in suspension, removal and legal action.

19. Church Data and Records

The platform may assist Churches with member records, attendance records, payment records, communication records, event records or service records.

The Church remains responsible for ensuring that its own records are correct and legally maintained.

Inkolo Connect is not responsible for internal Church disputes based on member lists, historical records, leadership lists, branch lists, attendance records or governance records unless the error was directly caused by Inkolo Connect’s proven platform fault.

Inkolo Connect may archive, correct, restrict or preserve data where there is a legal, security, compliance or dispute-related reason to do so.

20. Moderation Rights

Inkolo Connect may, at any time and without prior notice:

remove Content;

restrict user access;

suspend communication tools;

suspend Church administrator rights;

restrict payment functions;

hide disputed Church information;

request proof of authority;

block abusive users;

preserve records;

report unlawful conduct;

suspend a Church or Community space.

These actions may be taken where Inkolo Connect reasonably believes there is legal, financial, operational, safety, security, reputational, governance, community or compliance risk.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for loss, embarrassment, income loss, donation loss, reputation loss or opportunity loss caused by moderation actions taken in good faith.

21. Leadership Disputes

Where two or more people claim authority over a Church or branch, Inkolo Connect may require written proof of authority before making platform changes.

Proof may include:

Church constitution;

board resolution;

letter from recognised denominational authority;

mandate;

court order;

signed instruction from authorised office bearers;

minutes of meeting;

legal opinion;

any other document reasonably required.

Until Inkolo Connect is satisfied, it may freeze administrator changes, payment changes, dashboard changes, communication rights or Church profile edits.

Inkolo Connect does not decide who the rightful Church Leader is. Inkolo Connect only applies reasonable platform risk controls.

22. No Religious or Doctrinal Responsibility

Inkolo Connect does not control or determine religious doctrine, sermons, beliefs, teachings, rituals, prayers, spiritual practices, counselling, pastoral guidance or theological interpretation.

Any religious, spiritual, pastoral or doctrinal content is the responsibility of the relevant Church or user who provides it.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for religious disagreement, spiritual harm claims, doctrinal disputes, offence, disappointment or disagreement arising from Church content or conduct.

23. No Endorsement

The presence of a Church or Community on the platform does not mean Inkolo Connect guarantees, endorses or certifies that Church, its leadership, doctrine, governance, finances, services, safety, statements or conduct.

Users must make their own decisions about joining, supporting, donating to or participating in a Church or Community.

24. Complaints

Complaints about Church leadership, Church conduct, doctrine, membership, discipline, donations, events, pastoral care, governance or Church disputes must be directed to the relevant Church or denominational authority.

Complaints about technical platform issues may be submitted to Inkolo Connect support.

Inkolo Connect may review complaints that relate to platform misuse, fraud, abuse, unlawful content, privacy breaches or safety concerns.

Inkolo Connect is not obliged to resolve internal Church disputes.

25. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Inkolo Connect, Duranki, their directors, shareholders, employees, contractors, agents, partners, churches, communities, administrators and affiliates are not liable for any loss, damage, claim, injury, expense or liability arising from:

internal Church disputes;

leadership fights;

member disagreements;

branch disputes;

denominational disputes;

governance disputes;

Church disciplinary actions;

Church membership decisions;

removal from a Church or group;

doctrine or religious disputes;

pastoral advice or counselling;

donations, tithes or offerings;

alleged misuse of Church funds;

Church administrator actions;

unauthorised Church messages;

user-generated content;

defamatory statements by users;

harassment between Members;

event incidents;

volunteer incidents;

privacy breaches by users;

wrong Church or branch selection by a user;

disputes between Church Leaders and Members;

reputational harm caused by Church or Member conduct;

platform restrictions imposed in good faith.

Inkolo Connect is not liable for indirect, special, consequential or economic losses, including loss of income, loss of donations, loss of opportunity, reputational harm, emotional distress or spiritual distress.

Where liability cannot lawfully be excluded, Inkolo Connect’s liability will be limited to the platform fees actually paid to Inkolo Connect for the specific platform service giving rise to the claim, unless a higher amount is required by law.

26. Indemnity

The user indemnifies and holds harmless Inkolo Connect, Duranki, their directors, shareholders, employees, contractors, agents, partners, churches, communities, administrators and affiliates against any claim, loss, damage, penalty, legal cost, liability or expense arising from:

the user’s participation in My Community;

the user’s breach of these Terms;

the user’s breach of law;

the user’s content, messages or posts;

the user’s conduct towards Church Leaders or Members;

defamatory, abusive or unlawful statements made by the user;

misuse of personal information;

incorrect Church or branch selection;

disputes with Church Leaders;

disputes with other Members;

disputes about donations, tithes, offerings or payments;

disputes about Church membership or discipline;

claims arising from Church events, volunteer work or community activities;

any internal Church or Community dispute involving the user.

This indemnity continues after the user stops using the platform.

27. Suspension and Removal

Inkolo Connect may suspend, restrict or remove a user from My Community where the user:

breaches these Terms;

abuses another user;

posts harmful or unlawful content;

misuses personal information;

commits fraud;

creates community conflict through platform misuse;

impersonates a Church Leader;

interferes with Church administration;

creates legal, financial, safety, reputational or compliance risk;

is removed by an authorised Church administrator, subject to platform rules.

Suspension from the platform does not necessarily mean the user has been removed from Church membership. Church membership remains a matter between the user and the Church.

28. Changes to These Terms

Inkolo Connect may update these My Community / Church Terms from time to time.

Updated Terms may be published on the platform, sent by notification or made available through the user dashboard.

Continued use of My Community after updated Terms are published means the user accepts the updated Terms.

29. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa.

Any dispute will be handled according to South African law, subject to any rights that may not lawfully be excluded.

30. Acceptance

By joining or using My Community, the user confirms that they:

have read these Terms;

understand these Terms;

accept that Inkolo Connect is a platform facilitator only;

accept that Inkolo Connect is not responsible for internal Church disputes;

accept that disputes between Church Leaders and Members must be resolved by the Church or relevant authority;

accept that donations, tithes and offerings are made to the relevant Church or Community, not to Inkolo Connect unless expressly stated;

accept responsibility for their own conduct, content, payments and interactions;

agree to indemnify Inkolo Connect against claims arising from Church and Member disputes.

Suggested Platform Checkbox Text

Before a user joins or selects a Church/Community:

I confirm that I have read and accepted the My Community / Church Terms and Conditions. I understand that Inkolo Connect only provides the digital platform and is not responsible for internal church disputes, leadership disagreements, member fights, church governance, doctrine, discipline, donations, tithes, offerings, events, pastoral matters or disputes between church leaders and members.

Suggested Short Warning on My Community Page

Inkolo Connect provides the digital community platform only. Church governance, leadership, doctrine, donations, events, discipline and member disputes remain the responsibility of the relevant Church or Community. Please act respectfully and report platform misuse.

JOB SEARCH SERVICE TERMS AND CONDITIONS

Duranki Platform / Inkolo Connect

Effective Date: 10 June 2026 Version: 1.0

Inkolo Connect (Pty) Ltd - Registration number 2025/674136/07

These Job Search Service Terms and Conditions apply to all users who access, browse, list, advertise, apply for, accept, offer, perform, pay for, communicate about or otherwise use the Job Search service made available through the Duranki platform and/or Inkolo Connect.

By using the Job Search service, the user agrees to be bound by these Terms and Conditions, together with the main Duranki Platform Terms and Conditions, Privacy Policy, Wallet Terms, Community Rules, Payment Terms, and any additional rules or policies published on the platform from time to time.

1. Definitions

In these Terms:

“Duranki” means the Duranki digital platform, including its website, mobile application, dashboards, wallet systems, payment tools, communication tools and related services.

“Inkolo Connect” means the community, church and member-management platform operated on or through Duranki.

“Platform” means Duranki, Inkolo Connect and any related digital service, dashboard, app, website, wallet, communication channel or service module.

“Job Search Service” means the platform function that allows users to search for, list, advertise, apply for, accept, offer, perform, communicate about and pay for jobs, tasks, work opportunities, services, projects or micro-jobs.

“Job Poster” means any user, employer, business, church, community, organisation or individual who lists or advertises a job, task, service request or work opportunity.

“Applicant” means any user who views, responds to, applies for or accepts a job, task, service request or work opportunity.

“Worker” means any user who performs work, services, tasks, labour or duties for a Job Poster.

“Job Listing” means any advertisement, post, description, opportunity, work request, micro-job, job offer, task, vacancy, service request or employment-related post uploaded to the platform.

“Micro-Job” means a short-term, task-based or once-off work opportunity listed through the platform.

“Employment Job” means a work opportunity that may create an employment relationship between a Job Poster and Worker.

“User” means any person who uses the Job Search Service as a Job Poster, Applicant, Worker, employer, viewer or participant.

2. Role of Duranki and Inkolo Connect

Duranki and Inkolo Connect provide a digital platform that allows users to connect with each other for job opportunities, task-based work, micro-jobs, service requests and employment-related communication.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect are not the employer, employee, recruiter, labour broker, temporary employment service, private employment agency, contractor, agent, guarantor, payroll provider, supervisor, manager or workplace controller of any user unless expressly stated in a separate written agreement.

The work agreement, employment agreement, service agreement or task agreement is concluded directly between the Job Poster and the Applicant or Worker.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect do not guarantee:

that any job exists;

that any Job Poster is legitimate;

that any Applicant is qualified;

that any Worker will perform properly;

that any Job Poster will pay;

that any workplace is safe;

that any job description is accurate;

that any job complies with labour law;

that a user will be hired;

that a user will earn income;

that a user is trustworthy;

that any work relationship will be successful.

Users use the Job Search Service at their own risk.

3. Important Legal Notice

South African labour law may apply to work arrangements made through the platform.

The Basic Conditions of Employment Act establishes minimum employment conditions in South Africa, and employment arrangements may create legal duties for employers.

The Employment Services Act provides for public employment services and regulates private employment agencies. It also refers to the registration and regulation of private employment agencies.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect do not provide legal, labour, tax, immigration, recruitment or employment advice.

Each Job Poster is responsible for ensuring that their listing, hiring process, work conditions, payment, contract, safety measures and employment practices comply with all applicable laws.

Each Applicant or Worker is responsible for understanding the nature of the job before accepting it.

4. Platform Facilitator Only

Duranki and Inkolo Connect act only as a technology platform and communication facilitator.

They do not:

select applicants for Job Posters;

interview applicants on behalf of Job Posters;

employ Workers;

supervise Workers;

control working hours;

set salaries or wages;

manage workplace discipline;

guarantee payment;

guarantee job performance;

guarantee job safety;

verify every job listing;

verify every user’s qualifications;

guarantee legal compliance by users.

If Duranki or Inkolo Connect provides dashboard tools, wallet tools, ratings, document-upload functions, communication tools or payment tools, this does not make Duranki or Inkolo Connect the employer, recruiter or labour broker.

5. User Eligibility

To use the Job Search Service, a user must:

be registered on the Duranki platform;

provide accurate personal and contact information;

comply with verification requirements;

comply with these Terms;

comply with community rules;

comply with applicable law;

not be suspended or banned from the platform.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may refuse, suspend or terminate access where a user provides false information, fails verification, abuses the service, posts unlawful jobs or creates risk.

6. Minors

Users under the age of 18 may not apply for, accept, list, offer or perform work through the Job Search Service without the involvement and consent of a parent or legal guardian.

Job Posters must comply with all laws relating to child labour, young workers, school-going children, workplace safety and parental consent.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may remove listings, block applications or suspend users where the platform suspects unlawful or unsafe work involving minors.

7. Job Poster Responsibilities

A Job Poster is fully responsible for every Job Listing they create.

The Job Poster must ensure that each listing is:

truthful;

accurate;

lawful;

not misleading;

clear about the nature of the work;

clear about payment or salary;

clear about working hours;

clear about location;

clear about whether the role is full-time, part-time, temporary, permanent, casual, contract or once-off;

clear about required skills or qualifications;

clear about risks, tools, equipment or transport requirements;

compliant with labour, tax, immigration, health and safety laws.

The Job Poster is responsible for screening, interviewing, selecting, appointing, managing, paying and supervising the Worker.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect are not liable for any Job Poster’s listing, promises, conduct, workplace, payment failure or legal non-compliance.

8. Applicant and Worker Responsibilities

An Applicant or Worker must:

provide truthful information;

not exaggerate qualifications or experience;

not upload false documents;

not impersonate another person;

understand the job before accepting it;

ask questions about payment, hours, duties and safety;

arrive on time if work is accepted;

perform work honestly and competently;

comply with lawful workplace instructions;

not steal, damage property, threaten, harass or endanger anyone;

not accept work they are not qualified or legally permitted to perform;

not accept unsafe or unlawful work.

Applicants and Workers are responsible for their own decisions when accepting work.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect do not guarantee that any Job Poster will pay, treat the Worker fairly or provide a safe workplace.

9. Job Listing Requirements

Each Job Listing should include, where applicable:

job title;

job category;

location;

remote/on-site requirement;

type of job;

expected working hours;

start date;

expected duration;

payment amount or salary range;

payment method;

payment timing;

required skills;

required experience;

required documents;

tools or equipment needed;

transport requirements;

safety risks;

contact process;

selection process;

cancellation rules.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may remove, hide or edit listings that are incomplete, suspicious, misleading, unlawful, discriminatory, unsafe or reputationally harmful.

10. Prohibited Job Listings

Users may not list, advertise, accept or arrange any job, task or service that is illegal, unsafe, exploitative, discriminatory or harmful.

Prohibited listings include, but are not limited to:

illegal work;

scams or fake jobs;

pyramid schemes;

unlawful commission-only schemes;

jobs requiring upfront payment from Applicants;

adult sexual services;

escort services;

drug-related work;

illegal gambling work;

unlawful debt collection;

weapons-related work;

human trafficking or forced labour;

work involving stolen goods;

work involving fake documents;

work requiring bribery or corruption;

work that discriminates unlawfully;

work that exposes users to unreasonable danger;

work involving minors unlawfully;

work that requires a licence where the Job Poster or Worker does not have one;

any job Duranki or Inkolo Connect considers unsafe, unlawful, abusive or unsuitable.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may immediately remove prohibited listings and report serious matters to authorities.

11. No Upfront Fees to Job Seekers

Job Posters may not charge Applicants or Workers an upfront fee to apply for a job, secure a job, attend an interview or be considered for work.

The Department of Employment and Labour has stated that private employment agencies are prohibited from charging work seekers fees for services rendered.

Any user who requests payment from a job seeker as a condition for employment, application, interview or placement may be suspended, banned and reported.

12. No Guarantee of Employment

Duranki and Inkolo Connect do not guarantee that any user will receive work, employment, income, interviews or job offers.

The Job Search Service is a listing and connection tool only.

Users should not rely on the platform as their only source of income or employment.

13. Employment Relationship

Where a Job Poster hires a Worker, the legal relationship exists between the Job Poster and the Worker.

Depending on the facts, the relationship may be:

permanent employment;

fixed-term employment;

part-time employment;

casual work;

independent contracting;

once-off service work;

micro-job work;

volunteer work.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect do not determine the legal classification of the relationship.

The Job Poster must ensure that the correct agreement, payment structure, legal status and compliance process is used.

If an employment relationship is created, the Job Poster is responsible for all employer obligations, including wages, leave, working hours, deductions, UIF, PAYE, workplace safety, disciplinary processes and termination procedures where applicable.

14. Independent Contractors and Micro-Jobs

Where a Worker performs a once-off task or micro-job, the parties must agree clearly on:

task description;

expected result;

price;

deadline;

location;

required materials;

who supplies tools;

payment timing;

cancellation;

completion standard.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect do not supervise or control micro-jobs.

The Job Poster and Worker are responsible for agreeing whether the task is completed satisfactorily.

15. Payment for Work

Where the platform allows wallet payments, payment requests, QR payments or other payment tools, users must comply with the Wallet Terms and Payment Terms.

Payment may be made:

after completion;

in milestones;

upfront, if agreed;

through a platform payment request;

through wallet transfer;

through any other approved payment method.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may hold, delay, block, reverse or review payments where:

fraud is suspected;

a dispute is raised;

the transaction appears unlawful;

a user fails verification;

a payment partner requires it;

chargeback risk exists;

the platform detects suspicious activity.

Payment through the platform does not mean Duranki or Inkolo Connect guarantees the quality of work, payment by the Job Poster, performance by the Worker or legal compliance of the job.

16. No Payroll Responsibility

Duranki and Inkolo Connect are not responsible for payroll, payslips, tax deductions, UIF, PAYE, employment benefits, leave pay, overtime, minimum wage compliance or employment records unless expressly agreed in a separate written agreement.

The Job Poster is responsible for all employer obligations where applicable.

The Worker is responsible for their own tax and legal obligations where applicable.

17. Interviews and Meetings

Users may arrange interviews, calls, chats or meetings through the platform.

Users are responsible for their own safety when attending interviews or meeting other users.

Applicants should avoid unsafe locations, suspicious requests, unnecessary sharing of private information and any job that requires payment to apply.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect are not liable for theft, assault, harassment, loss, injury or harm arising from interviews, meetings or workplace visits.

18. Workplace Safety

Job Posters must provide a safe working environment where work is performed.

Job Posters must disclose any known safety risks, including:

working at heights;

electrical work;

construction work;

driving;

machinery;

chemicals;

heavy lifting;

night work;

isolated locations;

public-facing risk;

crime-prone areas;

tools or protective clothing required.

Workers must not accept work that is unsafe, unlawful or beyond their competence.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect are not liable for workplace injuries, accidents, illness, death, unsafe conditions or damage arising from work arranged through the platform.

19. Qualifications, Licences and Background Checks

Some jobs may require qualifications, licences, permits, police clearance, professional registration, driving licences or specialised training.

The Job Poster is responsible for verifying these requirements before appointing a Worker.

The Worker is responsible for ensuring they are qualified and legally allowed to perform the work.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may offer document-upload or verification tools, but this does not guarantee that a user is qualified, honest, suitable or legally compliant.

20. Discrimination and Fair Treatment

Users may not post or respond to listings in a way that unlawfully discriminates on the basis of race, gender, sex, pregnancy, marital status, ethnic or social origin, colour, sexual orientation, age, disability, religion, conscience, belief, culture, language, birth or any other prohibited ground.

Job Posters must treat Applicants and Workers fairly and respectfully.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may remove discriminatory listings and suspend users who abuse the service.

21. Documents and Personal Information

The Job Search Service may allow users to upload or share CVs, identity documents, certificates, licences, references, work history, banking information, location information or other personal information.

Users must only upload true and lawful documents.

Job Posters must only request information that is necessary for the job.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may process personal information for registration, verification, job matching, applications, communication, fraud prevention, dispute handling, safety, reporting and legal compliance.

POPIA regulates the processing of personal information by public and private bodies and creates conditions for lawful processing.

Users may not misuse, sell, share or disclose another user’s personal information obtained through the platform.

22. Communication and Chat

The platform may allow Job Posters, Applicants and Workers to communicate through chat, call, notifications or messages.

Users must not:

harass others;

threaten others;

send sexual content;

send abusive content;

send spam;

send fake job offers;

send fake payment confirmations;

request bribes;

request upfront fees;

request illegal work;

share another user’s private information unlawfully.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may monitor, store, review or disclose communications where necessary for safety, fraud prevention, dispute resolution, legal compliance or enforcement of these Terms.

23. Ratings and Reviews

The platform may allow users to rate Job Posters, Applicants or Workers.

Ratings are intended to support trust and accountability but do not guarantee that a user is honest, safe, qualified, reliable or legally compliant.

Users must provide truthful, fair and lawful reviews.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may remove false, abusive, defamatory or manipulated reviews.

Repeated poor ratings may result in restricted access or suspension.

24. Fraud, Scams and Abuse

Users may not use the Job Search Service for fraud, fake jobs, fake documents, fake applications, identity theft, phishing, money laundering, illegal work, bribery, harassment, exploitation or any unlawful conduct.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may use fraud-prevention measures, including:

identity checks;

device checks;

wallet monitoring;

listing review;

user reports;

suspicious pattern detection;

payment controls;

manual moderation.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may share information with banks, payment providers, law enforcement, regulators, community administrators or affected users where legally permitted or required.

25. Platform Moderation Rights

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may, at any time and without prior notice:

remove job listings;

hide listings;

suspend users;

restrict wallet access;

request verification;

block job categories;

block payment requests;

review communications;

limit account functions;

ban users;

report unlawful conduct.

These rights may be exercised where Duranki or Inkolo Connect reasonably believes there is legal, financial, operational, reputational, safety, community or compliance risk.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect are not liable for loss of income, job opportunities, applicants, reputation or business caused by moderation actions taken in good faith.

26. Community and Church Environment

Where the Job Search Service is used within a church, community or Inkolo Connect environment, users must act respectfully and in line with the rules and values of that community.

Community membership does not mean that Duranki, Inkolo Connect, KZNCC, a church, pastor, bishop or community leader guarantees any job, employer, worker, applicant or payment.

Churches, pastors, bishops, KZNCC, community leaders and administrators are not liable for job listings or work arrangements unless they personally act as the Job Poster or employer.

27. No Endorsement

The appearance of a Job Listing on the platform does not mean that Duranki or Inkolo Connect has approved, verified, endorsed, inspected, certified or recommended the job, Job Poster, Applicant or Worker.

Users must conduct their own checks before applying, hiring, accepting work or making payment.

28. Disputes Between Users

Users must first attempt to resolve disputes directly and in good faith.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may, but are not obliged to, assist by reviewing:

job listing information;

chat messages;

payment records;

completion evidence;

ratings;

uploaded documents;

user complaints.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect do not act as a court, arbitrator, employer, union, labour inspector, debt collector or legal representative.

Any decision by Duranki or Inkolo Connect to hold, release, reverse or block payment is a platform risk-control decision and does not prevent users from pursuing legal remedies independently.

29. Labour Disputes

If a Worker and Job Poster create an employment relationship, any labour dispute must be handled directly between them according to applicable labour laws and dispute-resolution processes.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect are not responsible for unfair dismissal claims, wage disputes, disciplinary disputes, workplace injury claims, discrimination claims, leave disputes, overtime disputes, UIF disputes or employment-contract disputes between users.

30. Service Availability

Duranki and Inkolo Connect do not guarantee that the Job Search Service will always be available, uninterrupted, secure or error-free.

The service may be unavailable because of maintenance, upgrades, network failure, technical issues, cyber incidents, third-party failures or events beyond the platform’s control.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect are not liable for missed job opportunities, failed applications, lost messages, delayed payments or loss of income caused by downtime or technical failure.

31. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Duranki, Inkolo Connect, their directors, shareholders, employees, contractors, agents, partners, churches, community administrators and affiliates are not liable for any loss, damage, claim, penalty, injury, death, expense or liability arising from:

job listings;

fake jobs;

scams;

non-payment;

poor work performance;

workplace injuries;

workplace accidents;

unlawful employment practices;

discrimination by users;

harassment by users;

unsafe workplaces;

failed interviews;

failed applications;

false documents;

user misconduct;

payment disputes;

tax or UIF issues;

labour disputes;

employment termination;

platform downtime;

third-party provider failure.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect are not liable for indirect, special, consequential or economic losses, including loss of income, loss of profit, loss of opportunity, reputational harm or emotional distress.

Where liability cannot lawfully be excluded, Duranki and Inkolo Connect’s liability will be limited to the platform fees actually paid to Duranki or Inkolo Connect for the specific job transaction giving rise to the claim, unless a higher amount is required by law.

32. Indemnity

The user indemnifies and holds harmless Duranki, Inkolo Connect, their directors, shareholders, employees, contractors, agents, partners, churches, community administrators and affiliates against any claim, loss, damage, penalty, legal cost, liability or expense arising from:

the user’s Job Listing;

the user’s application;

the user’s work arrangement;

the user’s breach of these Terms;

the user’s breach of law;

the user’s employment practices;

workplace injury or death;

non-payment or underpayment;

fraud or scams;

discrimination or harassment;

tax, UIF or payroll non-compliance;

misuse of personal information;

disputes with another user;

claims by employees, contractors, regulators, inspectors, payment providers or third parties.

This indemnity continues after the user stops using the platform.

33. Suspension and Termination

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may suspend, restrict or terminate a user’s access immediately if the user:

breaches these Terms;

posts fake jobs;

requests upfront fees;

fails verification;

provides false information;

uploads false documents;

refuses to pay for completed work;

performs work dishonestly;

harasses or threatens another user;

posts unlawful or discriminatory listings;

misuses wallet payments;

creates legal, safety, reputational or financial risk.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may also suspend or terminate the Job Search Service, or any part of it, at any time.

34. Reporting Problems

Users must report suspicious jobs, fake listings, fraud, abusive behaviour, non-payment, unsafe work, illegal work or requests for upfront fees through the platform’s reporting tools or support channels.

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may investigate reports but are not obliged to resolve every report in favour of the reporting user.

Users should report crimes, labour violations or serious safety issues directly to the relevant authorities.

35. Changes to These Terms

Duranki and Inkolo Connect may update these Terms from time to time.

Updated Terms may be published on the platform, sent by notification or made available through the user dashboard.

Continued use of the Job Search Service after updated Terms are published means the user accepts the updated Terms.

36. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa.

Any dispute will be handled in accordance with South African law, subject to rights that may not lawfully be excluded.

37. Acceptance

By accessing or using the Job Search Service, the user confirms that they:

have read these Terms;

understand these Terms;

agree to be bound by these Terms;

understand that Duranki and Inkolo Connect are platform facilitators only;

understand that Duranki and Inkolo Connect are not the employer, recruiter or labour broker unless expressly agreed in writing;

accept responsibility for their own listings, applications, work arrangements, payments, safety and legal compliance.

Suggested Platform Checkbox Text

Before a user applies for or posts a job:

I confirm that I have read and accepted the Job Search Service Terms and Conditions. I understand that Duranki and Inkolo Connect only provide the platform and are not responsible for the job, employer, applicant, worker, payment, workplace, safety, employment contract, labour dispute or any loss arising from my use of this service.

Suggested Job Poster Checkbox

I confirm that this job listing is true, lawful and not misleading. I accept full responsibility for the job, payment, working conditions, safety, legal compliance and any employment or contractor relationship created with the worker.

Suggested Worker / Applicant Checkbox

I confirm that I understand the job details and accept that I apply for or accept this work at my own risk. I understand that Duranki and Inkolo Connect do not guarantee the job poster, payment, workplace safety, employment terms or outcome of this opportunity.
